title: Flaky Floral Indian Coconut Soup
description: A fragrant, silky soup blending coconut milk, red lentils, and rose petals, finished with flaky toasted coconut for a subtle crunch—ideal for a cozy date night.
instructions: In the pressure cooker, sauté garlic and ginger on sauté mode until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add cherry tomatoes, red lentils, and vegetable stock; stir to combine.
Season with salt, pepper, turmeric (½ tsp), cumin powder (1 tsp), garam masala (1 tsp), and chili flakes (½ tsp).
Close the lid, set the pressure cooker to high pressure for 5 minutes, then allow a natural release for 10 minutes.
Turn off the cooker and stir in coconut milk, lemon juice, and cilantro; adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with toasted coconut flakes and a scattering of edible rose petals for a floral finish.
Optional: add a splash of lime juice just before serving for extra zing.
